name_cn:
Genuine Quality
💝170th Anniversary Milk Tea Pink, Limited Sale
When Saint Louis meets Anjou, the Anjou Mini Tote is born. The milk tea colorway features a linen and cotton blend for the outer surface ➕ imported matching top-grain calfskin. Exquisite and structured, it is also reversible. Includes coin purse, bag charm, and drawstring closure clip. Comes with a gift bag 🎁 A great choice for gifting or personal use.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660-1
